item.title: Fuck that wannabe-yank apartheid nepobaby
item.description: Gotta hand it to him tho, he's bringing Danes and Swedes together, something only massive amounts of alcohol usually do. Edit: Danish dockworkers and truckers have entered into a sympathy strike from the 20th of December, joined by their fellow union workers in Norway and Finland. This means no Teslas will be entering Sweden from the rest of Scandinavia.

item.title: The Hypocrisy Is Strong....
item.description: Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C1A5pZQurgH/?igshid=MzRlODBiNWFlZA Hey Imgurian, sorry I had to make the monies before I could reply! I hope you never have a heart of coal like these people do! Please have a wonderful Christmastime! Thank you for the accolade!✨ Happy holi-jolly Imgurian! Thank you for the accolade. In turn, I want nothing more than to wish you a warm, well-fed, and loving Christmas!✨ Imgurian, I will only accept the Originality Accolade if you accept the fact that you are the real original! I am merely the conduit in which memes and stories travel through, but I appreciate and thank you for it!✨ A Gem Imgurian?! You're making me blush. But I am only a piece of quartz to your diamond, for you carry a beautiful shine. Thank you for the accolade!✨ Good evening Imgurian! There is a saying, 'You can't make everyone happy, you're not pizza.' While this maybe true, you still make me happy. Thank you for the accolade!✨
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.title: I was so scared it was Covid, and I still don't know, but I'm already nearly completely over it.

Keep scrolling for the bonus panel!
Poor bear, he's trying his best. Support on Patreon for loads more of my exclusive bonus panels and comics https://patreon.com/LoadingArtist ❤ Oh and I'm also drawing the final Loading Artist comic of 2023 on Twitch today, starting soon! Why not come by and say hi https://twitch.tv/loadingartist
item.dc:creator: loadingartist

item.title: Found this little girl at the end of October. Look at her now after 2 months of life in a warm home surrounded by care and love
item.description:
28.10.2023 (1 day at home) When I found her, her eyes were completely full of pus and as it turned out the left one was gone.. the infection had completely "eaten" it before I found her... also she was so skinny
She was so hard to catch.. She hissed and scratched a lot out of fear at first, but it only took me 2 days to melt her heart and make her purring! It was such an incredible feeling when she purred for the first time
29.11.2023 (2 days at home)
31.10.2023 (4 days at home)
31.10.2023 First bath
01.11.2023 (5 days at home)
01.11.2023 (5 days at home)
05.11.2023 (9 days at home)
14.11.2023 (2,5 weeks at home) What a lady!
19.11.2023 (3 weeks at home) Now she’s healthy and super active baby!
27.11.2023 (a month at home) her left eye doesn’t bother her. The vet said that there is no need to worry, there is no inflammation and no manipulation of her eyes is required at the moment
03.12.2023 (a month at home) The thought that she could have been left on the street without help and died without timely treatment often made me cry the first weeks I took her in. I’m so happy that she’s safe now. All the time and all the money spent was absolutely worth it!
09.12.2023 A little yoga is never too much
12.12.2023 (1.5 month at home)
16.12.2023 (1.5 month at home) She befriended my older cat. His life is much more active now
04.12.2023 He wasn't ready for it :)
17.12.2023 (1,5 month at home)
17.12.2023 (1,5 month at home) As you've noticed, she really likes this cot :)
21.12.2023 I'm happy that this cute pirate is now mine. My Mushka ❤️ Thank you for reading & watching ❤️
item.dc:creator: beadedbonsaitree

item.title: I should have put it in my bio...
item.description:
EDIT: Since I'm on the front page, please consider donating to a local animal shelter or my local one: https://www.green-hill.org/donate/ they were recently burglarized in November and do a lot to help animals. I'm sure she would have loved whatever it is. She loved unwrapping gifts. During Christmas, she always waited for her turn, so we wrapped lots of treats and gifts for her. I wish I could contact my secret Santa to notify them so they could cancel the order and donate the same amount to a pet shelter. But since I can't, I'll donate it to a shelter here or give it to a friend.
She made it to 15 and had a long, spoiled life.
item.dc:creator: SeriousSeamstress

item.title: If he ever touched a human female, he’d know they have muscles under their skin… like every other mammal…
item.dc:creator: DaniusJones123

item.title: Expectation - Reality, how we made a pig toy that will go on a round-the-world journey.
item.description:
A little backstory: not long ago, I came up with an idea to create a toy. Its name is Biscuit, a charming piggy crafted by my wife and me. The mission of Biscuit is to travel around the world, passing from hand to hand. Through this unique project, I aim to connect people globally, showcasing the beauty of our planet and sharing fascinating stories and facts about various places. For this purpose, we created an Instagram page [https://www.instagram.com/BiscuitRoams], where all updates and adventures of Biscuit will be posted. Additionally, on Imgur, I will compile and publish complete stories. We spent a lot of time deciding on the size of the toy, eventually agreeing that it should not exceed 20 centimeters. This makes it easy to fit in a backpack or a travel bag without causing any transport issues. However, the smaller size did make sewing more challenging, as the stitches don't flex as well, and the fine details and curves are harder to execute. We tried for three days to make a toy that resembled our reference. It was tough; the parts seemed disproportionate to me. Eventually, I decided to sew the toy from imperfect pieces to understand the entire production process. The result was the photo below.
As it turned out, I needed to completely redo the blueprint. The head's shape, which I initially thought of as a sphere divided into equal parts, didn't work. I found a toy online with a round head and used its blueprint instead. The key was in the differently-sized petals. Our initial arms and legs, which were sewn directly into the body, were problematic due to the body's small size. It was impossible to fit and sew them inside and then turn the pattern out. So, we abandoned that idea and sewed the arms and legs separately, attaching them to the body with a hidden stitch. The final version turned out like this. Please evaluate it. Although it's not as even as we'd hoped, we found it acceptable considering its size.
And yes, this was our first time sewing with a machine. It wasn't as hard as it seemed, but we did ruin quite a few parts. Currently, I'm looking for someone traveling from Montenegro to another country to start Biscuit's journey. All short updates, stories, and Biscuit's location will be posted on our Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/BiscuitRoams]. Soon, we will try to make some clothes and a small backpack for Biscuit. We plan to create clothes that can be put on and taken off. We'll find out soon how feasible this is.
item.dc:creator: BiscuitRoams

item.title: Kari Lake said America was the least racist country before Obama was president.
item.dc:creator: moxythree

item.title: Secret Santa!
item.description:
Who ever is my Secret Santa your an absolute legend!! This is by far one of the best gifts I have ever received, pllllllllleaase DM me so I can thank you in person!!
I love Futurama! I was in complete shock and amazement opening this! One word to my Imgur Secret Santa…EPIC!! For everyone asking, the package had a business card from an Etsy shop NerdyWood8008
item.dc:creator: PhucYoCouch

item.title: I devote this dump to my wife so I can close tabs pt. 23
item.description:
Hydrate. Take your meds. Take a shot of syrup after you scarf down some french toast. Or don't. I'm not your dad. Or am I?!?!?!?!
I disagree with a lot of the categorizations within this, but the idea that Kant would "face danger head-on, sometimes too boldly" is laughable to me.
My permanent state of existence? Living. And when I die, I won't be around to hear you argue with me.
Life can only exist within certain confines. Too hot, too cold, not enough water... and life ceases. A high-quality life must also conform to the rules of quality that it itself imposes. Life, and especially high-quality life, is not unconditional. One must choose.
shiny rock is shiny
I just want them to be happy! Also, how great would it have been for this to come right after I said to drink the maple syrup? I want breakfast food now...
Ah, beans. (because they lead to farting!)
False. The earlobes don't droop enough.
I think about this line every now and again. Haven't had a chance to use it yet, but kind of want to.
Biggest. Gaudiest. Patroni.
My isolation isn't a coping mechanism. It's a feature, not a bug. And I eat the wrong stuff, not too much stuff. There's a difference.
Sweet baby thor, is that too much to ask for? Pardon the rhyme.
I hear you can stop a real big fight with a real big guy real quick if you just... take your pants off. Haven't tried it myself. Matter of fact, I wouldn't even recommend it to anyone else. It's kind of the opposite of "before you judge someone, walk a mile in their shoes. Then, you'll be a mile away and have their shoes."
They're commeownicating, and I'm hungry.
I think there might be some underlying issues here, and maybe she needs to see a doctor.
Out of the many, many gay people I've met, not a single one of them has ever tried to even gently push homosexuality on me or ANYONE. That ISN'T. The POINT. Of being GAY. WHAT the FUCK are these people TALKING ABOUT?!
Buy your favorite groceries and something new to expand your horizons. And so it is.
Personally, I love worms in a platonic sense. Super helpful for soil enrichment and aeration. What's that? You wouldn't love me if I were a worm? You wouldn't love a worm? Of course? Because why wouldn't you? What the fuck are we even talking about? Yes, that's true. Humans do tend to love other humans and not random other animal species like worms. In fact, "loving" other species is often a crime called "bestiality" although it would be... complicated to try to commit bestiality with a worm.
Wife.
Kali ma! Sweet baby Thor, why are humans so weird...?
Take a deep breath and relax your muscles, love.
Right now it's satire. If humanity survives long enough, it'll be prophecy.
Totes malotes, dawg.
I'm the misanthrope, except when it comes to cooking. I love to feed people.
*cough* WIFE *cough*
Quid pro quo, Clarice. You give me tuna, I give you answers.
Why didn't they gut and process that animal before moving out? It could very well be spoiled by the end of the day.
Git gud, horses. Jeez.
Somebody, idk who, commented saying her face looks like she's saying "You named me Cheesecake, what did you expect?!" Absolutely perfect.
It's an investment. Think of how much we'll make after I do the glamorous and sexy photoshoots with them!
Gonna get these for my teenage son, when I have one someday.
I'm a slut for fried cheese and marinara. What an iconic duo.
I am Bewitched Cookie, and yes, my thoughts are indeed made of bread. Wife says I'm Magic Home Invasion Mailman and she's Sleepy Job Creator. I'm pretty sure she's not actually drunk on orphan blood, though.
If you have beef with a silly little guy, that makes YOU a silly little guy. Then we're the same, and you shouldn't have beef with silly little guys like you. C
I'd have so many gotdamned stars! I crave them!
They're so damned opinionated! But I love them. Roast them for the feast of the winter solstice.
The duality of pig.
Five seems a bit much, but one or two have never let me down. A little bread, maybe an etree? Baby, you got yourself a stew going.
Marie Kondo is an agent of big SMALL. She's out there, trying to convince you to have *more* less. MORE less?! It's an inherent contradiction in terms. They've played us for fools!
If you gave me an entire lifetime, I don't think I could come up with better iconography than this.
It doesn't matter what you roll if you roll deep. We're all in this together.
The tests of truth are: internal consistency, agreement with experience, and expedience of explanation. I want interlocutors with ^ those.
Do you eat ass? Sometimes. But - more often - I bite butt. Omn.
Things are getting crispy in the crisper.
I'll add your... vent? I don't know where I was going with this one.
WIFE. We need a new decorative crow.
WHAT KIND OF A NAME IS SPOONS, AND HOW DO I PET THAT ANIMAL. SPOONS GOTS MITTENS.
Roombasaur is resigned to its fate. Toastersaur will never understand the world around it.
One billion percent me. Sweet baby Thor, I love my bed. It's where I do almost all of my best sleeping, and almost half of my best fucking. #NSFW
PeepPeepPeepPeepPeepPeep *loaf* PeepPeepPeepPeepPeepPeepPeepPeepPeepPeepPeepPeepPeepPeep *loaf*
Last holiday season, I swore that next year - THIS year - I'd nog my own egg. Promise: broken.
Cook your bacon thoroughly, kids. Otherwise, this looks pretty tasty.
"Fair" is a four-letter word. If you want things to be fair for everyone who ever lives, then nothing will ever progress or improve. The whole point of life is to make things BETTER for yourself, your tribe, and the world as a whole.
I think this is amazing. I'd love to learn how to set up one of these avatars.
At first I thought "Oh, it's Malaguena!" I was wrong.
Only concert I'd pay to go to. They're playing my kind of music!
Somehow, this is both me and Wife at each other.
Hey rich people, gtfo Earth so we can fix things. Otherwise, you won't get everything you want, assuming that "you living" is something you want.
Interesting chart, even if I disagree with a lot of the categorizations. Discuss!
The way the cat's face is drawn causes great joy in me.
Foxxy lady...
I offer no argument to this. Sunday is Peach. Saturday is Bowsette.
We all feel a little awoo sometimes.
This is considered an insult within isopod culture.
You've got it on your head, though. Bnuy is gonna piss on your head and chew on your hair.
item.dc:creator: J4nein4ne
